message:
bin/detect_changed_files.sh::priority block replace exact text '# Priority ordering for detection (Stage-3 + Stage-4 literal lanes):
# 1) CLI args stay the highest priority
# 2) CHANGED_FILES env (space/newline separated) stays second priority for the literal default override
# 3) git diff/ls-files fallback keeps Stage-4 multi-line scans bounded' with '# Priority ordering for detection (Stage-3 + Stage-5 literal lanes):
# 1) CLI args stay the highest priority
# 2) CHANGED_FILES env (space/newline separated) stays second priority for the literal default override
# 3) git diff/ls-files fallback keeps Stage-4 multi-line scans bounded
# Stage-5 batches keep dual literal targets bounded' only. keep literal window within stage5 guard.

bin/remote_finalize.sh::behavior bullets replace exact text 'Behavior:
  - always runs: make quick
  - --offline changed (default): make test-changed-offline
  - --offline full: make test-offline
  - --offline skip: no offline behavior tests' with 'Behavior:
  - always runs: make quick
  - --offline changed (default): make test-changed-offline
  - --offline full: make test-offline
  - --offline skip: no offline behavior tests
  - Stage-5 finalize helpers expect bounded literal batches before remote finalize' only. keep literal window between 3 and 8 lines; no other edits.
